headline: AT&T Tests AI App To Cut Costs And Deepen Customer Relationships
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has launched a new AI powered customer app and a suite of digital tools aimed at improving customer experience and internal efficiency. The rollout focuses on simplifying digital interactions, expanding self service options, and tailoring customer support and offers. The company is positioning these tools to reduce service friction and support more targeted upselling across its customer base.
